.nav-file-title-content::before.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #363636 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#363636, color-mix(in srgb, #363636 65%, transparent))
.nav-file-title-content::before.--font-default: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
.nav-file-title-content::before.--font-monospace: '??', '??', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
.nav-file-title-content::before.--font-monospace-default: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
.nav-file-title-content::before.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #363636 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#363636, color-mix(in srgb, #363636 65%, transparent))
.nav-file-title-content::before.--raised-mask: linear-gradient(white, white) padding-box, linear-gradient(white, white) border-box
.nav-file-title-content::before.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")
.nav-file-title-content::before.mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xmlutf8,<svg xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\"><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"3\"/></svg>")
.nav-file-title-content::before.background: rgb(175, 175, 175) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(30, 31, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgba(168, 199, 250, 0.08) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(30, 31, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(30, 31, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(25, 25, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(30, 31, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(30, 31, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(30, 31, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(30, 31, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
